_comment: Central registry of all evaluation targets for the reproducible pipeline

targets.name: exploitable
targets.label: Exploitable App
targets.description: Internal deliberately-vulnerable Flask app with 47 endpoints across reflected, stored, DOM, bypass, mutation, and legacy categories

targets.name: juice-shop
targets.label: OWASP Juice Shop
targets.description: OWASP Juice Shop — modern insecure web app with search, login, reviews, feedback, and basket XSS endpoints

targets.name: webgoat
targets.label: OWASP WebGoat
targets.description: OWASP WebGoat — deliberately insecure web app with XSS lessons (reflected, stored, DOM, CSRF+XSS)

targets.name: owasp-benchmark
targets.label: OWASP Benchmark
targets.description: OWASP Benchmark — Java vulnerability detection benchmark with ~2,740 labeled test cases (212 XSS-specific)
